# GNAT UK

> Specialist demolition contractor in the United Kingdom: robotic demolition (Brokk and Husqvarna fleet), hydrodemolition (Aquajet, Conjet, ERGO, NALTA), diamond drilling and sawing, abrasive cold cutting, and machine hire. Method-led delivery for confined-access, structurally-sensitive, and live operational environments.

GNAT UK Limited (Company No. 05590884) is based in Richmond, North Yorkshire (DL10 4FD) with operational bases in Derby and Stevenage. Founded in the early 2000s. Managing Director: Nick Turnbull. Posts authored by Nick Turnbull, Keith Hodgson, Steve Tempest-Mitchell. Telephone: 01748 826046. Email: office@gnatuk.com.

The company specialises in demolition methods that conventional contractors cannot or will not deliver: structures inside listed buildings, work in active hospitals/data centres/process plants, refractory kiln debricking, post-tensioned concrete, ATEX zones, and confined access through sub-800mm doorways. Sectors served: water utilities (AMP8 framework), refractory/chemical, healthcare, infrastructure (rail, road, bridges), heritage, banking sector retrofits, marine, and nuclear-adjacent civils.

## Services

- [Robotic Demolition](https://www.gnatuk.com/robotic-demolition): Remote-operated Brokk and Husqvarna machines for confined access and structurally sensitive work.
- [Hydrodemolition](https://www.gnatuk.com/hydrodemolition): High-pressure water concrete removal; preserves rebar; non-percussive, vibration-free.
- [Diamond Drilling & Sawing](https://www.gnatuk.com/diamond-drilling): Hilti track saws, wire saws, stitch drilling for precision concrete cutting.
- [Abrasive Cold Cutting](https://www.gnatuk.com/cold-cutting): Spark-free water-jet cutting for ATEX zones and live process environments.
- [Machine Hire](https://www.gnatuk.com/machine-hire): Brokk fleet 70 / 110 / 170 / 200 / 300 / 500 / 800 available with or without operators.

## Support services

- [Support Services](https://www.gnatuk.com/support-services): Early Contractor Engagement, Method Development, RAMS Support, Site Trials.

## Project case studies

- [Case Studies index](https://www.gnatuk.com/case-studies): 25 selected projects across water, refractory, listed-building, infrastructure and bank-vault sectors.

## Method and technical insights

- [Insights index](https://www.gnatuk.com/insights): 14 method/technique pieces explaining hydrodemolition, robotic demolition, diamond sawing and cold cutting.

- [Blog](https://www.gnatuk.com/blog): Fleet updates and industry notes.
